capabilities_used.evidence: 图表中最明确的是 ETHUSDT 周线用黄色框标出上方约 3.9k-4.0k 阻力、下方约 1.9k 支撑，属于典型高时间框架区间位交易。推文也反复强调 support/support zone：如 [2024-04-30] “$BTC dropped and is once again retesting that support zone.”、[2024-08-24] “$CORE main support has been holding strong”。

ETH 周线图从 2025 高点快速回落至 1.9k 附近，结构是 lower highs + 强下跌腿；他对市场的措辞也常是弱势环境判断，如 [2025-10-30] “This market just looks horrible. Most alts are hitting another all time low...” 和 [2025-12-20] “The PA is still weak but that support level has been holding out so far.”

[2025-03-29] “What will you do if $ETH ends up dropping to the $1k level?” 显示他会预设更深跌幅而不是盲目抄底；[2025-01-29] 询问 WIF 是否可 refill，随后 [2025-01-31] “I guess it was not a great area to refill in 😂😂 $WIF”，体现对过早抄底的复盘。
[2026-04-10] “Trading the invalidation.” 这是很典型的以失效位为止损/反手锚点的表达，说明他不是预测式死扛，而是围绕 invalidation 做交易执行。
ETH 周线图里前期平台/突破位被重新标为黄色支撑区，接近“前阻力变支撑/前支撑变阻力”的 breaker 思路；[2024-08-24] “we need to see a flip of the $1.5 region to fully reverse trend” 也明显是 level flip 框架。
图表在 2025 下跌到 1.9k 区域前后有明显长针插入关键位后收回，说明他关注关键区域的扫流动性/插针反应，而不只是收盘价本身。
ETH 周线图多个顶部与中继位置都出现长上影/长下影的拒绝 K，尤其 3.8k-4.0k 附近多次长针回落，显示他会把 wick rejection 作为区域有效性的证据。
[2024-10-30] “Now who do we have to sacrifice to finally see an Ethereum pump?”、图 5 “ALT SEASON 2021 / ALT SEASON 2025” meme，说明他持续盯 ETH/山寨季相对强弱切换，虽然表达偏戏谑。

虽然没直接提 FOMC，但他明显把重大政治/宏观 headline 当风险事件处理：[2025-01-31] “Dude woke up and just decided he is going to nuke all our bags..”、[2025-02-28] “Did Trump announce another tariff while I was asleep or what? $BTC”。这是一种事件驱动避险框架。
他常把加密价格波动直接映射为 broader risk-on/risk-off 的结果，尤其在特朗普、关税、战争 headline 下讨论 BTC/ALTS 表现，属于风险偏好切换框架的弱形式。
他的内容经常围绕高波动和不稳定环境：[2025-10-30] “This market just looks horrible”、[2025-08-24] “Could you guys just stop nuking $BTC so late in the night?”，说明他默认市场经常处于情绪化高波动 regime。
[2024-08-24] “we need to see a flip of the $1.5 region to fully reverse trend” 隐含只有真正站稳/翻转才算确认，没站稳的突破不可信；其“Trading the invalidation”也说明会围绕突破失效做交易。
他会在行情强的时候切到趋势延续叙事，如 [2024-03-31] “$ONDO above 1$ and another all-time high! ... #RWA season continues”，说明并非只会抄底，也会承认强势板块延续。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: HTF Horizontal Zone Mapping
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 高时间框架水平供需区标定
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Mark multi-month support and resistance boxes on 1D/1W charts, then wait for reaction or reclaim/rejection before taking directional risk.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在 1D/1W 图上先标出多月级别水平支撑阻力箱体，再等待价格在箱体附近出现反应、收回或拒绝后才承担方向性风险。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: ETH 周线图把 1.9k 与 3.9k 一带画成宽黄区；[2024-08-24] 直接说 $CORE main support holding，且需要 $1.5 region flip。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Invalidation-First Trade Framing
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Frame setups by the exact level that invalidates the thesis, and size/execute around that level rather than around a target-first narrative.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 先定义哪一个价位会让交易逻辑失效，再围绕这个失效位去做仓位和执行，而不是先讲目标位故事。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-04-10] 直接写 “Trading the invalidation.”，这是他少数明确暴露方法论的原话。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Headline Shock Repricing
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use sudden geopolitical or policy headlines as the catalyst for crypto repricing, especially when market structure is already weak or sitting on support.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当市场本就偏弱或压在关键支撑上时，把突发地缘政治或政策头条视作加密资产再定价催化剂。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-01-31] “Dude woke up and just decided he is going to nuke all our bags..”、[2025-02-28] “Did Trump announce another tariff while I was asleep or what? $BTC”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Crypto Twitter Sentiment Extremes
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: CT 情绪极端反向参考
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treat extreme despair/euphoria in the feed as a soft contrarian input, especially around obvious support or after repeated bagholder capitulation memes.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把时间线上极端绝望或亢奋的情绪当作软性的反向指标，尤其是在明显支撑位或连续 bagholder 绝望段子之后。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 他大量使用 bagholder/poverty/ramen 叙事，如 [2025-10-29] “Back to Poverty Island $BTC”、[2025-09-23] “those juicy support levels across many altcoins”。

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 交易先看 thesis 何处失效，失效就撤，不为观点死扛。

personal_quirks.quote: What will you do if $ETH ends up dropping to the $1k level?😱
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 默认预演极端 downside，不把当前支撑当成必守。

personal_quirks.quote: I guess it was not a great area to refill in 😂😂 $WIF
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 错误加仓位会公开承认，说明他会事后修正而不是硬拗。

personal_quirks.quote: we need to see a flip of the $1.5 region to fully reverse trend.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 趋势反转不是猜出来的，要等关键位真正翻转确认。

personal_quirks.quote: Eh fuck it, I am throwing some of my ramen noodle fund into a $PUMP entry at this level.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在高 beta 山寨上会做小仓位投机，但语气上就把它归类为可承受损失的风险资金。

unique_traits: 他不像纯技术派那样堆大量指标，更像是“高时间框架水平位 + 失效位交易 + 头条/情绪催化”的混合型交易者。内容风格极强，很多推文是 meme、政治或市场情绪表达，但真正有用的方法论浓缩在少数几句：守关键位、等 flip、错了就按 invalidation 认错。相较其他 TA 账号，他更依赖叙事和社媒情绪温度计，而不是系统化指标矩阵。

high_conviction_phrases: main support has been holding strong
low_conviction_phrases: if we don't bounce from here
